title: Add stable software playback for generated MIDI
description: Windows Media Player and OS MIDI output are not reliable for this project. Add a playback path that can render generated notes without depending on wmplayer or an external MIDI synth.
close_reason: Added software WAV rendering and updated play.ps1 to use WAV playback instead of wmplayer MIDI playback.

title: Refactor GM_INSTRUMENTS to struct of arrays
description: Rewrite GM_INSTRUMENTS in src/nwc-to-musicxml/instruments.ts from its current representation to a struct-of-arrays layout while preserving behavior.
close_reason: Refactored GM_INSTRUMENTS to a struct-of-arrays export and verified with Deno.

title: Improve shifted tag diff alignment
description: Diff output currently reports many neighboring tags as changed when an insertion or removal shifts later tags by one. Implement a better alignment algorithm so the diff identifies inserted and removed tags directly.
close_reason: Implemented Myers-style line alignment for regression XML diffs and added focused insertion/deletion tests.
